headline: Berkshire May Have Sold $15 Billion of Stocks Run by Former Manager
summary: CEO Greg Abel decided to unload the stocks that had been managed by Todd Combs, who left in December for JPMorgan Chase.

headline: American Express World Trade Center Move Reframes Long Term Growth Story
summary: American Express announced plans to build a new global headquarters at 2 World Trade Center in New York. The company will become the anchor tenant at the last undeveloped site in the World Trade Center complex. The move ties American Express’s long term corporate footprint to Lower Manhattan and the city’s financial core. For investors tracking NYSE:AXP, the headquarters decision comes with the stock trading around $331.69 and a mixed recent return profile. Shares show a 5.8% gain over the...

headline: Morgan Stanley Lowers AmEx (AXP) PT; Reuters Reports Push into AI Expense Management
summary: American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 16, Jeffrey Adelson of Morgan Stanley lowered the firm’s price recommendation on American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) to $385 from $395. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The analyst said the firm is cutting price targets […]
